    T

    textFlow - Variable in class gui.TutorialScene
    The text flow component displaying the dialog text.
    textFont - Static variable in class util.DialogManager
    The font used for the dialog text.
    ThreadManager - Class in util
    Manages thread execution.
    ThreadManager() - Constructor for class util.ThreadManager
    Default constructor for ThreadManager.
    threadPool - Static variable in class util.ThreadManager
    A list of active threads managed by the ThreadManager.
    TICK_RATE - Static variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Amount of times in a second to trigger update of an updatable object.
    timeline - Variable in class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    The timeline controlling the animation.
    title - Variable in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Label for the summary title.
    Tomato - Class in entity.ingredients
    Represents a tomato ingredient.
    Tomato() - Constructor for class entity.ingredients.Tomato
    Constructs a new Tomato ingredient.
    TOMATO - Enum constant in enum class logic.ItemSpriteType
    Enum constant for item sprite type.
    TomatoSauce - Class in entity.ingredients
    Represents tomato sauce ingredient.
    TomatoSauce() - Constructor for class entity.ingredients.TomatoSauce
    Constructs a new Tomato Sauce ingredient.
    tooltip - Variable in class sprites.ItemSprite
    The tooltip displayed when hovering over the sprite.
    toString() - Method in class entity.base.BaseItem
    Return a representation of the item in form of String.
    toString() - Method in class entity.ingredients.Bacon
    Return a representation of the item in form of String.
    toString() - Method in class entity.ingredients.Dough
    Return a representation of the item in form of String.
    toString() - Method in class entity.ingredients.Egg
    Return a representation of the item in form of String.
    toString() - Method in class entity.ingredients.Potato
    Return a representation of the item in form of String.
    totalCashReceive - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Accumulated cash amount received since the first day.
    totalCashSpent - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Accumulated cash amount spent since the first day.
    totalOrderServed - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Accumulated amount of order served since the first day.
    totalReceivedLabelList - Variable in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Label list for total cash received.
    totalServedLabelList - Variable in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Label list for the total number of orders served.
    totalSpentLabelList - Variable in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Label list for total cash spent.
    TrackMode() - Constructor for enum class util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack.TrackMode
     
    TrackName() - Constructor for enum class util.BGMManager.TrackName
     
    Tray - Class in entity.containers
    Represents a tray container.
    Tray() - Constructor for class entity.containers.Tray
    Constructs a new Tray container.
    TRAY - Enum constant in enum class logic.ItemSpriteType
    Enum constant for item sprite type.
    TUTORIAL - Enum constant in enum class util.BGMManager.TrackName
    Tutorial track.
    tutorialImage - Variable in class gui.TutorialScene
    The image view displaying the tutorial image.
    TutorialScene - Class in gui
    Represents the tutorial scene UI.
    TutorialScene() - Constructor for class gui.TutorialScene
    Constructs the tutorial scene.
